getAllMovies() - Method in interface com.videolibrary.rmi.VlsService
Retrieves all active movies in the database regardless of genre.

getBorrowedMovies(String) - Method in interface com.videolibrary.rmi.VlsService
Retrieves a list of movies currently borrowed (and not yet returned) by a customer.
getBorrowedMovies(String) - Method in class com.videolibrary.rmi.VlsServiceImpl
Retrieves a list of movies currently borrowed (and not yet returned) by a customer.
getCustomers() - Method in interface com.videolibrary.rmi.VlsService
Retrieves a list of all active registered customers from the database.
getCustomers() - Method in class com.videolibrary.rmi.VlsServiceImpl
Retrieves a list of all active registered customers from the database.
getGenre() - Method in class com.videolibrary.models.Movie
Retrieves the genre of the movie.
getGenres() - Method in interface com.videolibrary.rmi.VlsService
Retrieves a list of all active genres from the database.
getGenres() - Method in class com.videolibrary.rmi.VlsServiceImpl
Retrieves a list of all active genres from the database.
getId() - Method in class com.videolibrary.models.Movie
Retrieves the database ID of the movie.

Retrieves a list of all active movies belonging to a specific genre.
getMoviesByGenre(String) - Method in class com.videolibrary.rmi.VlsServiceImpl
Retrieves a list of all active movies belonging to a specific genre.
getReturnedMovies(String) - Method in interface com.videolibrary.rmi.VlsService
Retrieves a list of movies that a customer has previously borrowed and successfully returned.
getReturnedMovies(String) - Method in class com.videolibrary.rmi.VlsServiceImpl
Retrieves a list of movies that a customer has previously borrowed and successfully returned.

Retrieves the title of the movie.
